title: Minecraft Dungeons Enchantment Icons
description: Adds the icons for Enchantments as seen in Minecraft Dungeons to your game by manipulating the font
body:
**Mickey Joe' "Dungeons Enchantment Icons" is a free pack that works entirely without OptiFine.**

By manipulating the language file and the font files, I'm able to add custom 'emoji', that I use in this case to add a new system to visually display each enhantment!

Please enjoy and have a look at the showcase video I made of this feature:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/urxFZ4VqMPg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Please note that as of right now, this pack only supports the US and UK English language options in the game.

also please check out the trailer of my complete resource pack; "Barely Default"
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hlDLtxC3sK4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

please let me know what you think and join my discord for any questions or if you just wanna hang out. We have fun https://discord.gg/QK2YJX82p6
